articles.author: Bryan Mena
articles.title: Americans are shelling out for higher gas prices while cutting back on some goods - CNN
articles.description: The war with Iran is forcing Americans to pay more for gasoline as people cut back on purchases of some long-lasting goods.
articles.content:
The war with Iran is forcing Americans to pay more for gasoline as people cut back on purchases of some long-lasting goods.
